speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Arise, go up to Bethel and dwell there. Make an altar there to the God who appeared to you when you fled from your brother Esau

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: Your name is Jacob; your name shall no longer be called Jacob, but Israel shall be your name

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: I am God Almighty: be fruitful and multiply. A nation and a company of nations shall come from you, and kings shall come from your own body

speeches.speaker: God
speeches.englishText: The land that I gave to Abraham and Isaac I will give to you, and I will give the land to your offspring after you
